name: Freezer Mix Cheeseburger Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Mix biscuit baking mix and milk until a soft dough forms. Form into a ball on a floured cloth-covered surface and knead 5 times.
3. Roll out the dough to be slightly larger than an inverted 9-inch pie pan. Carefully place it in the pan and flute the edges.
4. Cook the freezer mix in a large skillet until browned. Remove excess fat, then stir in salt, pepper, additional biscuit baking mix, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Turn the meat filling into the pastry-lined pan. Arrange tomato slices over the filling.
6. Beat eggs slightly and stir in cheese. Spread evenly over the tomatoes.
7. Bake for about 30 minutes. Cut into wedges and serve with chili sauce if desired.
